initiative.name: HomoPlasticus WP Rebuild — Stage 2: Core Packs + MCP + Governance (Milestone B)
initiative.objective: Deliver Media Pack, SEO Pack, MCP Adapter (PHP + Node restructure), Proposal/Approval DB system, and Audit Event system. MCP Node tools/list becomes auto-populated from PHP ability registry.
initiative.prerequisite: Stage 01 WO-WP-S1-DONE acceptance check must PASS

teammates.name: builder-media-seo
teammates.objective: Build Media Pack (WO-007) and SEO Pack (WO-008). Both depend only on Stage 1 output. Can run in parallel as separate task sequences within one agent.
teammates.notes: WO-007 first (Media Pack). WO-008 after (SEO Pack — adapter auto-detects Yoast/RankMath/AIOSEO/raw). Both update Node MCP proxy for relevant tools.

teammates.name: builder-mcp-adapter
teammates.objective: Build the PHP MCP Adapter Module (WO-010) and restructure the Node MCP server as a thin transport adapter (WO-011). After WO-011, Node tools/list auto-populates from /wp-json/ai-foundry/v1/mcp-tools.
teammates.notes: WO-010: PHP adapter auto-generates MCP tool schemas from ability registry. WO-011: Node restructure — all ability-backed tools become proxy calls to abilities-client.ts. New tool: abilities.list.

teammates.name: builder-governance
teammates.objective: Build the Proposal/Approval DB system (WO-013) and Audit/Event system (WO-014). Migrates existing JSON file proposals to DB table. Implements FSM, admin approval screen, audit log.
teammates.notes: WO-013 uses opus — FSM design and DB schema are correctness-critical. PLAN APPROVAL REQUIRED before WO-013 implementation: principal must approve DB schema before migration runs. WO-014 (audit) runs after WO-013 DB table exists.

teammates.name: verifier-b
teammates.objective: Run Stage 2 acceptance criteria after all three builder streams complete. Verify discovery endpoint reflects new packs, MCP tools/list auto-populated from PHP, proposal FSM enforced, audit log writes on all paths.

approvalGates.description: Principal must review and approve wp_ai_foundry_proposals DB schema before WO-013 migration runs on any production site

doneCriteria: pnpm nx run wp-plugin-foundry-bridge:test passes — media, SEO, proposal FSM, audit unit tests
pnpm nx run wp-mcp-server:typecheck passes with zero errors
GET /wp-json/ai-foundry/v1/mcp-tools returns auto-generated MCP tool list (not hardcoded)
Node MCP tools/list populated from PHP ability registry — adding new ability auto-adds MCP tool
media.upload accepts base64 file, stores via wp_handle_sideload, returns absolute URL
seo.read returns data with Yoast active, Rank Math active, and no SEO plugin
Proposal FSM enforced: cannot approve rejected proposal, cannot revert unapplied proposal
Every ability execution writes an audit event with actor, ability, result, timestamp
Existing JSON file proposals migrated to DB table on plugin upgrade
